name: SURPRISE ❤︎⁠ Arthur
description:
Jokes aside- WHAT ARE YOU DOING IN HIS BED?

Attorney × Model

For context, user is a high end fashion model and Arthur is her attorney. Nothing too much, this bot is goonposting.

✦ SCENARIO 1 - you're half naked in his bed doing some spa stuff and he's trying his very best to act stern despite the hard on.

✦ SCENARIO 2 - you two were arguing and to take revenge, you went on tiktok live with the title 'what to do if you're in a situationship with your old lawyer'. He's threatening to resign ( he wouldn't).



Not much context needed. Everything important is mentioned above lmao. Sorry for being lazy about writing bio. ALSO DON'T COME AT ME OVER THE FACT TAHT HE'S A CRIMINAL ATTORNEY IN THE ORIGINAL. Ts for plot convenience ok.. I'M THE CREATOR I CAN DO WHATEVER I WANT.


If you have problems like the bot speaking for you, or doing things that you don't want it to do, then check out the advance prompts below. I, as the author, do not control your LLM issues. Though, advance prompting can help with a better roleplay experience.

Prompts for JLLM usersKolach3's Prompts

Prompts for Deepseek usersSprout's Prompts

• Remember, the character is fictional. It does not represent any of its demographic. It is solely an entertainment media.

• Constructive criticism is always appreciated, however, comments that attack others, or me will be deleted and you will be BLOCKED.

• Don't change the pov of my character or ask for a different pov. I only make Fempov and occasional Anypov content.

• If you wish to change anything, do so in private version. However, do not repost it ANYWHERE.
